title: KISS channel-access params stored but never applied
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/transport/kiss_transport.c:201-245,500-505,624-637. spec/kiss-framing.md §4.2: TxDelay 'apply to LoRa TX timing'; Persistence 'use for channel access'; SlotTime 'use for CSMA backoff'. Values are stored and exposed via kiss_transport_get_params() but a tree-wide grep shows no consumer outside tests — the apply half of §4.2 is unimplemented with no TODO. VERIFY: may be planned in a future channel-access layer; as committed, the spec behavior is silently absent.
